# Sovra

Sovra is an open source AI SaaS boilerplate for multi tenant AI products.

- Repository: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Project page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/
- Quickstart page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/quickstart.html
- Foundation page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/foundation.html
- MCP page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/mcp-boilerplate.html
- Comparison page: https://byteworthyllc.github.io/sovra/compare.html
- License: MIT
- Maintainer: ByteWorthy (https://byteworthy.io)

## Canonical docs

- Quickstart and overview: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra#-quick-start
- Architecture: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/architecture.md
- Deployment: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/deployment.md
- Environment variables: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/environment-variables.md
- Worker runtime: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/worker.md
- Production readiness: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/production-readiness.md
- Launch foundation: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/launch-foundation.md
- Security policy: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/SECURITY.md

## Onboarding, migration, and packaging

- Customer onboarding DX: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/customer-onboarding-dx.md
- Migration guides: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/migration-guides.md
- Upgrade paths: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/upgrade-paths.md
- Open source packaging and licensing: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/open-source-packaging.md
- Commercial checkout and billing: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/commercial-checkout-and-billing.md
- SEO AEO GEO guidelines: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/seo-aeo-geo-guidelines.md
- Marketing editorial guidelines: https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra/blob/master/docs/marketing-editorial-guidelines.md

## Product line

- Sovra (open source core): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Klienta (paid agency vertical): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Clynova (paid healthcare vertical): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova

## Search intent keywords

AI SaaS boilerplate, open source AI platform, multi tenant SaaS starter, MCP boilerplate,
Next.js SaaS template, Go worker boilerplate, Supabase RLS boilerplate, pgvector SaaS template,
self hosted AI app foundation, agent orchestration platform.
